checks.finding: A common neutral contact follows materialization in every standard branch. Across the two order branches its route, endpoints, amount, event time, scheduler index, event kind, and channel match. Only node-proper-time and derived row digests differ; native polarity is computed solely from M_H/B_ref live masses and the producer's decision reads that polarity with expected_source_surface_digest null.
checks.name: exclude_hidden_latest_contact_path

H_P_role.identity_rule: one ordered token sequence shared by all registered contributions; no contributor-private slots, success field, or lineage-indexed substate

M_H_role.identity_rule: deterministic output port/cache of H_P, never an independently selected state-carried pool; response masks may read M_H but not P, S1, S2, or audit logs

clamp_intervention.reason: fixture-only history clamp with native contribution audit preserved

checks.finding: H_P is persisted adapter state with independent replacement/reset semantics; R_H reads H_P and public native packets materialize M_H. The machine contract identifies the functional pool as H_P plus M_H output-port binding, not P or M_H alone.
checks.name: confirm_active_H_P_and_M_H_output_port

checks.finding: P/C_P, H_P, L, U_H, R_H, M_H, V, and forbidden G are machine-bound with ownership, inputs, causal/audit status, and restoration duties. U_H admits only unseen route-local native arrivals from a registered source-node set to P.
checks.name: complete_history_carried_factorization
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: I06 must preserve the frozen fixture's unique registered source-to-P path or add an explicit route/channel admission key; source/target membership is the current exact adapter filter.

checks.finding: operation_kind is the same physical native-arrival operation for both sources; amount and interval come from contact physics. No source, lineage, packet, event, route digest, or contributor slot enters a token or R_H.
checks.name: physical_token_type_excludes_contributor_identity

checks.finding: scan_index and consumed surface digests gate admission only; R_H reads tokens only. They are persisted in current/reset adapter identity, clamp/reorder does not rewind them, and paired load/reset continuation passed.
checks.name: cursor_and_idempotency_isolation

checks.finding: The branches use fresh identical fixtures and equal operation counts. Before V, P matches within the frozen implementation tolerance and the response-visible neutral contact/configuration match; M_H and its balancing-reservoir consequence are the declared history-path differences. Post-response A/B differ only because V fired in one branch.
checks.name: order_contrast_continuation_state_matching

evidence.readout_rule: source-label-invariant, order-sensitive fold over H_P: r_0 = 0; r_(j+1) = lambda * r_j + typed_amount_j, with 0 < lambda < 1

checks.finding: I03B claims an active ordered history and deterministic scalar readout, not irreducible raw-history necessity or non-Markovianity.
checks.name: bounded_non_irreducibility_claim

intervention.reason: fixture-only history clamp with native contribution audit preserved

checks.finding: The clamp replaces H_P itself, preserves native audit/P, retains the consumed-row cursor, rematerializes M_H, performs no later ingest before V, and carries explicit intervention provenance in adapter/composite identity.
checks.name: active_history_clamp_stability

checks.finding: The P-to-K_P debit cannot satisfy the adapter's registered-source-to-P arrival filter. It occurs before the common neutral contact, leaves H_P/M_H and producer configuration fixed, and the retained response record matches canonical.
checks.name: state_only_debit_exclusion

checks.finding: Both source debits and deterministic contribution slots are retained, but packets terminate at K_P outside the H_P admission boundary. No token is admitted and the same neutral response opportunity follows.
checks.name: write_diversion_source_activity_matching

checks.finding: Two separate adapter instances materialize two separate ports; each feedback mask reads one port, no aggregate is returned or fed back, and the branch runs in a fresh isolated model.
checks.name: private_partition_no_common_read

checks.finding: A_alt is not a contributor and uses the same M_H/B_ref feedback class without source lineage or contributor address. This proves architectural accessibility only.
checks.name: alternate_access_role_eligibility
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: R05 retention, capacity, and scientific access comparison remain I04/I06 and execution work.

checks.finding: Static source inspection confirms the adapter reads rows, maintains/intervenes on H_P, computes R_H, and requests public balancing packets only. It contains no feedback/producer invocation, response threshold, cached-quantity mutation, success computation, or later-response schedule.
checks.name: adapter_stops_at_declared_boundary

native_blockers: LGRC9V3CausalPulseSubstrateSurfaceRow is explicitly passive evidence and does not update an active common history carrier.
emit_feedback_eligibility_surface_row derives from only the latest route-local contact row and live node coherence; it does not fold a registered multi-contribution sequence.
The feedback producer reads only the latest feedback row and an optional expected digest for that row; this is not a common, independently intervenable multi-event history.
The optional LGRC-0 causal-history artifact is annotation-only and cannot mutate runtime or drive a later response.
No admitted public native operation performs a history-only reorder/clamp while preserving encounter state and audit attribution.
native_strengths: LGRC9V3RuntimeState owns an ordered causal_pulse_substrate_surface_log and packet ledger.
Each committed packet event can emit a route_local_pulse_contact row with physical amount, endpoints, channel, event order, and time.
The exact runtime artifact, surface log, native producer configuration, and valid reset baseline are covered by the native v2 restoration identity.
Native feedback and packet producers can own the final history-derived response transition after a compatible causal readout is materialized.

rejected_native_shortcuts.reason: The log remains audit evidence; no response consumes the complete registered history.
rejected_native_shortcuts.shortcut: Treat the ordered native surface log as H_P without adding an active read path.

rejected_native_shortcuts.reason: It compares one latest-row digest containing event/route identity selected by configuration, not a source-independent common-history carrier; using it as success authorization would be controller-addressed.
rejected_native_shortcuts.shortcut: Use expected_source_surface_digest as the history condition.

rejected_native_shortcuts.reason: The admitted implementation and reference guide declare it derived, annotation-only, and non-mutating.
rejected_native_shortcuts.shortcut: Treat an LGRC-0 annotation artifact as active history.

checks.finding: The admitted native log remains passive/latest-row based without an active multi-event history or history-only intervention. The selected adapter adds only that carrier/readout bridge; native mutation and response remain intact.
checks.name: counterfactual_producer_minimality

evidence.accumulation: applicable; append admitted physical tokens to one H_P
evidence.claim_boundary: No native history primitive, resource economy, circulation, trail maintenance, recurrence, selfhood, or agency claim follows.
evidence.depletion: applicable only as explicit active-history clamp/replacement; no autonomous deletion selected
evidence.leakage: not_applicable; lambda is an order-sensitive readout weight, not autonomous wall-time decay of retained H_P
evidence.mixing: applicable; ordered source-label-invariant fold over the common token sequence
evidence.reserve: native source/reservoir/M_H coherence and packet budget measured; H_P itself is an external ordered identity rather than a conserved resource
evidence.saturation: not_applicable; no history capacity/saturation rule selected

checks.finding: The selected implementation is run-bounded append-only under normal admission, explicitly whole-history replaceable by intervention, with no autonomous deletion, fixed capacity, saturation, leakage/decay, or maintenance transition. Those absences are explicit rather than ecologically inferred.
checks.name: history_lifecycle_semantics
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: I06 must bound branch/event counts and either retain these not-applicable lifecycle classes or register a new reviewed construction; no conformance fixture capacity may become scientific calibration.

checks.finding: Continuation state is layered: native v2 plus complete adapter current/reset identity and fixture role binding form the composite; the immutable runtime freeze additionally binds adapter code, token/admission semantics, harness, and graph source digests. Materialization is synchronous and drains its native queue, so no adapter-side pending operation exists.
checks.name: complete_composite_identity

checks.finding: The harness uses a manifest-coordinated native+adapter save, validates both loaders and the complete loaded composite before continuation, invokes only paired resets, forbids implicit rebase in the binding, and demonstrates equal continuation after load/reset. Missing/corrupt component loads or mismatched composite identity raise before response continuation.
checks.name: paired_save_load_reset_fail_closed
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: I06 must expose the paired procedure as the only registered continuation interface and validate manifest component hashes explicitly; the conformance harness proves the governed path, not a generic atomic transaction API.

checks.finding: Machine booleans prohibit scientific support/falsification, calibration entry, registration reuse, execution replacement, mode ranking, and downstream authorization. I03BR1 adds an explicit downstream rejection set without changing the frozen conformance artifact.
checks.name: mechanical_scientific_quarantine
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: I04 and I06 validators must reject the I03B fixture coefficient, amounts/types/times, threshold, packet amount, branch IDs, response values, comparator, and evidence digest; only the pre-runtime fold family may be imported.

checks.finding: All twelve frozen branch IDs are retained. Each standard branch constructs a fresh model and adapter; private/restoration branches construct their own fresh state. The single matrix invocation and single independent reconstruction each ran all branches, with zero retries and byte-identical output.
checks.name: complete_isolated_twelve_branch_matrix
checks.qualification_or_downstream_obligation: The common-profile initial composite digest is retained once as the deterministic fresh-fixture witness rather than duplicated per standard branch; private profiles are identified by their separate frozen configurations and fresh construction.

checks.finding: I03B is mode-local, leaves I03A accepted and unchanged, performs no performance comparison, and treats native history inadequacy as specific to history_carried.
checks.name: preserve_i03a_independently

checks.finding: I03BR1 itself opens nothing. A new owner progression decision may accept I03B implementation evidence and authorize I03C only; I04 remains blocked on the complete reviewed three-mode discriminator gate.
checks.name: owner_progression_opens_only_i03c

claim_boundary.history_claim: active ordered history retained and causally materialized into a later native response path through a deterministic scalar readout

reject_from_I04_I06: fixture token amounts, operation values, and event times
fixture native feedback threshold and response packet amount
fixture branch identifiers and observed response values
retained conformance or reconstruction digest as candidate evidence

functional_pool_identity.pool: H_P plus its declared M_H native output-port binding
